title: plutarchia pubiflora
side_effects: Plutarchia pubiflora can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea, nausea, and abdominal pain. In severe cases, excessive consumption can lead to headaches, dizziness, and respiratory problems. Additionally, the plant's interaction with certain medications can cause adverse reactions, such as increased blood pressure and allergic reactions. Long-term misuse can also result in liver and kidney damage, emphasizing the importance of proper usage and under medical supervision.
